LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT STATE COMPENSATION INSURANCE FUND'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS AS TO THE FIRST, SECOND, AND THIRD CAUSES OF ACTION OF PLAINTIFF STEVEN MARION-WALKER'S COMPLAINT IS GRANTED AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. THE AMENDED PLEADING SHALL BE FILED BY THE END OF BUSINESS DAY OF JULY 3, 2008. IF NOT, THE STATE OF THE PLEADINGS REMAIN. THE MOTION IS DENIED AS TO THE FIRST AND THIRD CAUSES OF ACTION. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR# 7077
